repairs_completed.justification: VehicleAssignment is polymorphic covering ServiceJob but ServiceJob had no inverse relationship. Job-to-vehicle-assignment navigation via ORM was broken.
VehicleStock.reserved_for_job_id FK existed but ServiceJob had no HasMany inverse. Stock reservation queries from job side required raw queries instead of ORM.
originating_quote_id FK exists on service_agreements. The commercial sale-to-agreement lineage was only queryable via computed method, not via Eloquent relationship.
renewal_quote_id FK exists on service_agreements for contract renewal cycles. No BelongsTo was declared.

repairs_completed.action: Added originatingQuote() BelongsTo → Quote (origin_quote_id) + added Quote import
repairs_completed.justification: origin_quote_id FK exists on service_plans. Sale-to-plan commercial lineage was only accessible via computed method.
sale_agreement_id FK exists on service_plans for sale-recurring plans. No BelongsTo was declared.

repairs_completed.action: Added saleAgreement() BelongsTo → ServiceAgreement (sale_agreement_id) + User import
repairs_completed.justification: sale_agreement_id FK exists on service_plan_visits. No BelongsTo was declared.
assigned_to FK exists on service_plan_visits but no Eloquent BelongsTo was declared. Visit-level user assignment was not ORM-queryable.
service_agreements.premises_id FK properly migrated and ServiceAgreement.premises() BelongsTo declared, but Premises had no inverse. Premises→ServiceAgreement ORM navigation was broken.
dispatch_routes.vehicle_id FK properly migrated and DispatchRoute.vehicle() BelongsTo declared, but Vehicle had no inverse HasMany.

repairs_completed.action: Added technicianAvailabilities() HasMany → TechnicianAvailability (via assigned_user_id) + TechnicianAvailability import
repairs_completed.justification: Route and technician availability were completely disconnected at the ORM layer. Availability checks against routes required cross-querying through user_id.

repairs_completed.action: Created RepairOrderService with full lifecycle methods: create(), createFromServiceJob(), schedule(), reserveParts(), consumeParts(), complete(), close(), cancel()
repairs_completed.justification: The repair lifecycle had no orchestrating service. RepairOrder records could only be manipulated via direct model operations without event emission or lifecycle consistency.

VehicleAssignment stores morph aliases ('service_job', 'dispatch_route') rather than FQCNs. Without morphMap, the new ServiceJob.vehicleAssignments() MorphMany would query/write FQCNs while existing data uses aliases. morphMap registration ensures Eloquent resolves aliases to correct model classes.

repairs_completed.action: Registered 28 previously unregistered Work-namespace events in $listen array
repairs_completed.justification: 28 event classes existed in app/Events/Work/ but were not registered in EventServiceProvider. They could be dispatched but no listeners would fire (silent signals). Critical operational signals including VehicleAssignedToJob, VehicleStockReserved, VehicleStockConsumed, DispatchETAChanged, DispatchJobLate, and all SaleRecurring* events were affected.

deferred_repairs.reason: No FK or bridge table exists. Requires schema decision (add vehicle_stock_id to repair_part_usages or create bridge table).
Requires design of slot allocation algorithm, conflict detection, and calendar integration strategy.
Requires design of availability window query logic vs scheduled jobs.
Multiple services compute readiness independently. DispatchReadinessService should be sole aggregator.
Coverage resolution is split across model helpers and EquipmentCoverageService.
VehicleAssignment.assignable morph covers Shift but no inverse declared on Shift model.
ServiceAgreement uses $guarded=[] while all other FSM models use explicit $fillable. Risk of accidental mass-assignment of internal columns.

next_correct_phase: dispatch intelligence scoring / predictive scheduling / capability registry extension
